# Links and Inline Formatting

# Links and Formatting

Here's a [simple link](https://example.com).

Link with **formatted** text: [Read _more_ here](https://test.com)

Absolute URL: [Query params](https://example.com/path?q=1&lang=en)

Relative URL: [About page](/about)

Anchor link: [Jump to section](#section)

Multiple formats: **bold**, _italic_, `inline code`, and **very _strong_**

**Nested _formatting `with code`_ in bold**
